reviews.review_description: That are they saying is not true their just trying to get this game out of meta they are also making lies like harassment which is a lie they not even play the game they just wanted to make this game horrible
I recently downloaded and played the game just to be called many slurs by what seemed to be a developer. Someone needs to demote that guy
Absolutely disrespectful owners. I will be never recommending this game to anyone.

developer_response.body: Hi, its me, duck. Our developers are nice to our players. Please tell me their name so we can take action. Thank you and we are sorry for your bad experience
